title: Deontics (Δ)
description: What must/can/cannot be done - obligations, permissions, prohibitions

triple-export-obligation.what: Update all 3 export locations when adding new repository
triple-export-obligation.why: Missing any location causes Module has no exported member errors
triple-export-obligation.how: Update: (1) repositories/index.ts, (2) main index.ts export, (3) both factory functions
evidence: ACCT-001: Forgot main index.ts initially, typecheck failed

factory-function-update-obligation.what: Add new repository to BOTH createMoneyWorksClient AND createDataLayer
factory-function-update-obligation.why: Both factory functions create repository instances, missing one breaks downstream consumers
factory-function-update-obligation.when: After adding repository export to index.ts
factory-function-update-obligation.how: Add 'entityName: new EntityRepository(client)' to both functions' repositories object
evidence: ACCT-001: Updated both functions with account: new AccountRepository(client)

table-registry-registration-obligation.what: Register all API controllers in TableRegistry
table-registry-registration-obligation.why: Unregistered controllers make entities inaccessible via REST API
evidence: US-001: Product not registered → still in 'upcoming'

evidence-collection-obligation.what: Collect concrete evidence for each acceptance criterion
evidence-collection-obligation.why: Objective validation prevents false positives, provides audit trail
evidence-collection-obligation.how: File paths with line numbers, test output, API responses, TypeScript compilation results
evidence: US-002: Created validation report with evidence for all 27 ACs

full-stack-completion-obligation.what: Include all 4 layers (canonical, data, API, UI) in entity stories
full-stack-completion-obligation.why: Partial implementations leave features incomplete and require follow-up

retrospective-generation-obligation.what: Generate comprehensive retrospective for all completed stories
retrospective-generation-obligation.why: Captures learnings, feeds Weave knowledge base, improves future execution
retrospective-generation-obligation.how: Document: what went well, what could improve, decisions, learnings, Weave recommendations

static-validation-permission.what: Accept static validation when browser testing is blocked by environment
static-validation-permission.when: Dev server crashes, memory pressure, or other environmental issues
evidence: US-002: 25/27 ACs validated via static analysis, 2 blocked by environment

parallel-task-execution-permission.what: Execute independent tasks in parallel via multiple Task tool calls
parallel-task-execution-permission.when: Tasks have no dependencies and can run concurrently

incomplete-api-layer-prohibition.what: NEVER create controller without registering in TableRegistry
incomplete-api-layer-prohibition.why: Makes entity inaccessible via API, leaves it in 'upcoming' status
incomplete-api-layer-prohibition.violation: US-001 created ProductController but didn't register it
incomplete-api-layer-prohibition.enforcement: 5-step registration checklist, explicit AC for registration

mock-data-only-testing-prohibition.what: NEVER rely solely on mock data without real integration testing
mock-data-only-testing-prohibition.why: Mock tests can pass while real integration fails
mock-data-only-testing-prohibition.correctApproach: Mock mode enables testing, but validate with real API endpoints when possible

partial-entity-delivery-prohibition.what: NEVER deliver entity stories with only canonical + data layers
partial-entity-delivery-prohibition.why: Leaves features incomplete, requires follow-up stories, users cannot use feature
